title: agropyron maritimum
intro: Agropyron maritimum, also known as sea barleygrass or beach barley, is a type of grass that grows in coastal areas and has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea, and its anti-inflammatory properties make it effective in reducing swelling and pain. The health benefits of Agropyron maritimum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Agropyron maritimum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in capsules and powder form to make the most of its medicinal properties.
